summary: W578 connects the W577 compact-target normalized finite-shape transfer route to the bounded stable-semantic gate. It adds reusable WPP-transfer-to-stable-semantic helpers in BoundedFiniteProducts and closed-map/closed-embedding W578 adapters that turn W577 transfer inputs plus direct bounded left calculus and triangulated fields into a ready W528 stable certificate. This is verified nonterminal support only: concrete closed quotient-cover data, source cokernel-pi-zero data, compact-target provider data, row data, normalized fixed-target localization data, bounded left calculus, and triangulated data remain unconstructed.
